# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ include "postgres.postgresqlUsername" . }}
type: Opaque
stringData:
   password: {{ include "postgres.postgresqlPassword" . }}
---
apiVersion: {{ include "chart.katacoda.io/pg-database-chart.apiVersion" . }}
kind: PostgreSQLDatabase
metadata:
  name: {{ include "postgres.postgresqlUsername" . }}-{{ include "postgres.postgresqlPassword" . }}{{ end }}
spec:
    dbname: postgres
    user: "{{ include "postgres.postgresqlUsername" . }}"
    passwordSecretName: <PASSWORD>-password
    namespace: {{ include "postgres.namespace".}}
  {{- if .Values.pgDatabase.postgresqlPassword }}
    password: '{{ .Values.pgDatabase.postgresqlPassword }}'
{{ end }}
